title: FAKIR: Foundational Architecture for Knowledge, Intelligence & Reasoning (UKOP kernel)
description: Kernel of the Universal Knowledge Operating Platform (UKOP). v0.3 mounts the exhaustive lattice inside the shared Zistgah virtual dome: vendor/zistgah-dome factors the complete zistgah.org experience (interior hall, oculus time scrub, CHAKRA calendars and dial, flight system, exhibit pedestals, dawn, nebula) into a reusable app/lib - verbatim plus 9 marked config seams; projects mount displays via window.ZISTGAH_DOME.display. FAKIR's display: every UN ISIC Rev.4 (21/88/238/419), ILO ISCO-08 (10/43/130/436) and UNESCO ISCED-F 2013 (11/29/80) node - 1,505 nodes, 935 leaves x AGI stack L0-L9 (Project ILM) = 9,350 seed points; every node at every level seeds an oracle-gated AAB task (VGC doi:10.5281/zenodo.21264248). Poster corpus DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21436552.
notes: (c) 1993-2026 Abhishek Choudhary. All rights reserved. AI model: Claude Fable 5 (Anthropic). DOI injected post-mint; no fabrication.
